phases.name: Core, Config System, and Admin Config Control Plane
phases.description: Establish runtime foundation, canonical configuration domains, and admin-first config control flows.

tasks.name: Bootstrap and Config Domain Loader [CMP_CORE_AGENT_ORCHESTRATOR]
tasks.description: Implement strict config loading and startup validation for app, channel, model, capabilities, MCP servers, scheduler, and store domains.
tasks.notes: Pydantic schemas for all 7 config domains; ConfigLoader reads YAML + env overrides; bootstrap() entry point with fail-fast SystemExit on validation error. Project setup also delivered: pyproject.toml, Makefile, src/ skeleton, config/ YAML templates.

tasks.name: Env Override Projection and Provenance [CMP_CORE_AGENT_ORCHESTRATOR]
tasks.description: Implement validated environment override projection with provenance metadata and fail-fast policy behavior.
tasks.notes: Implemented inside ConfigLoader: apply_env_overrides() projects ASSISTANT_<DOMAIN>_<KEY> env vars with JSON type-parsing and double-underscore nested key support (e.g. ASSISTANT_SCHEDULER_RETRY_POLICY__MAX_ATTEMPTS); _build_provenance() tracks per-field source labels (file/env_override/default); effective_config() returns {config, provenance} with secrets redacted. Extracted env parsing helpers to env_utils.py. Fixed: effective_config() now performs fresh disk+env read on every call and actually annotates provenance in output.

tasks.name: FastAPI Gateway Baseline and Config Endpoints [CMP_API_FASTAPI_GATEWAY]
tasks.description: Implement health endpoints, admin auth guard, and config read/validate/diff/apply endpoint flows.
tasks.notes: FastAPI app with lifespan-based config bootstrap; Bearer token admin auth guard (ASSISTANT_ADMIN_TOKEN); /health/live and /health/ready endpoints; /admin/config/effective (returns config+provenance, fresh disk read), /validate, /diff, /apply endpoints with allowlist-controlled key mutation, atomic YAML write, and live runtime reload via update_runtime_config_domain(). EffectiveConfigResponse now includes provenance dict. ApplyResponse includes live_reloaded flag.

tasks.name: Admin Config Panels and Apply Workflow [CMP_ADMIN_MINIMAL_UI]
tasks.description: Implement minimal admin UI flow: load, edit allowlisted keys, validate, diff preview, confirm, and apply.
tasks.notes: Server-rendered admin UI with Tabler CSS + HTMX + Alpine.js. Cookie-based session auth (itsdangerous signed token). Config dashboard shows all 7 domains with provenance badges (env/default). Edit workflow: GET form partial -> POST diff preview -> Alpine.js confirm -> POST apply -> live reload. Allowlist-restricted editable keys per domain. Field types: select, number, textarea (line_list), text. Partials: domain_form.html, diff_result.html, apply_result.html. Auth: login/logout at /admin/login, session in HttpOnly cookie. Added jinja2 + itsdangerous to deps, SessionMiddleware to FastAPI app. 18 unit tests covering auth helpers and form parser.

tasks.name: Anthropic Adapter and Correlation Propagation [CMP_PROVIDER_LLM_ANTHROPIC_ADAPTER]
tasks.description: Integrate Anthropic-first provider adapter baseline and propagate correlation IDs through model call paths.
tasks.notes: Implemented LLMProviderInterface + models, AnthropicAdapter with retry, correlation context var in observability. 16 unit tests all passing.

deliverables: Runtime bootstrap module and validated config domain loader
Effective-config API with redaction and provenance projection
Admin config UI with controlled apply flow and audit trail
Health endpoints and provider baseline call path with trace IDs
success_criteria: Service starts with validated configuration only
Invalid config payloads fail safely without destructive persistence
Effective-config projection includes secret redaction and source provenance
Admin config apply flow enforces validate/diff/confirm and records audit events
Health endpoints report readiness and liveness consistently
Baseline model invocation path returns successful responses

phases.name: Store Foundation and Runtime State Integrity
phases.description: Establish durable persistence, idempotency, and lock-protected atomic state updates for runtime domains.

tasks.name: Store Facade and Internal Persistence Modules [CMP_STORE_STATE_FACADE]
tasks.description: Implement store facade and session/task/idempotency/lock persistence components with filesystem backend baseline.
tasks.notes: Implemented store facade with filesystem backend: StoreFacade provides unified access to SessionStore (JSONL append-only logs), TaskStore (JSON task state), IdempotencyLedger (duplicate prevention with TTL), and LockCoordinator (file-based locks with TTL). Includes atomic write utilities and startup recovery scan. 47 unit tests all passing.

tasks.name: Atomic Writes and Lock TTL Recovery [CMP_STORE_STATE_FACADE]
tasks.description: Implement atomic write semantics, lock TTL behavior, and recovery marker lifecycle.
tasks.notes: Implemented StoreRuntimeManager providing operational controls and monitoring: background cleanup of expired locks/idempotency records (configurable interval), recovery marker history tracking with component filtering, comprehensive store statistics, lock diagnostics with contention detection, administrative operations (force release locks, manual recovery trigger), atomic write and lock TTL verification tests. Integrated into StoreFacade with optional enable flag. 16 unit tests, all store tests passing (69 total).

tasks.name: Session History Append/Read/Replay [CMP_STORE_SESSION_PERSISTENCE]
tasks.description: Implement session history append, read, and replay contracts for per-turn agent lifecycle continuity.
tasks.notes: Implemented replay module (build_replay), replay_for_turn on SessionStoreInterface and FilesystemSessionStore, orphan tool-call detection and synthetic tool_result repair in StoreFacade._scan_sessions. 29 tests passing.

tasks.name: Ingress Idempotency Registration and Check [CMP_STORE_IDEMPOTENCY_LEDGER]
tasks.description: Implement idempotency key registration and duplicate-check path for channel and API ingress.
tasks.notes: IngressIdempotencyService wraps IdempotencyLedgerInterface with source-namespaced key building (source:event_id), is_duplicate check, register (raises DuplicateIngressError on dup), and atomic check_and_register. 11 unit tests passing.

deliverables: Store facade APIs with filesystem backend baseline
Session/task/idempotency/lock persistence modules
Recovery marker and consistency scan routines
Store-level diagnostics and audit events
success_criteria: Session and task state persist across restarts without corruption
Duplicate ingress events are rejected deterministically
Concurrent writes for the same session/task are lock-protected
Atomic write failures preserve last good state and emit recovery diagnostics

phases.name: Telegram Channel and Normalized Event Intake
phases.description: Enable Telegram-first interaction with deterministic event normalization for text, voice, attachment, and callbacks.

tasks.name: Telegram Adapter Ingress/Egress Core [CMP_CHANNEL_TELEGRAM_ADAPTER]
tasks.description: Implement Telegram adapter ingress and egress with allowlist enforcement and outbound retry policy.
tasks.notes: Implemented NormalizedEvent/ChannelResponse models (INT_ORCH_EVENT_INPUT, INT_CHANNEL_RESPONSE), AllowlistGuard with audit logging, TelegramIngress normalizing text/voice/attachment/callback_query updates, TelegramEgress with 3-attempt exponential-backoff retry for text and interactive (inline keyboard) responses, TelegramAdapter composing all components. 30 unit tests, all 220 project tests passing.

tasks.name: Normalized Event Mapping to INT_ORCH_EVENT_INPUT [CMP_CORE_AGENT_ORCHESTRATOR]
tasks.description: Implement normalized inbound event mapping including callback and idempotency fields.
tasks.notes: Defined canonical OrchestratorEvent (INT_ORCH_EVENT_INPUT) in core/events/models.py with all spec fields including scheduler-originated fields (SchedulerMeta, SchedulerTriggerKind). Moved shared sub-models (EventType, VoiceMeta, AttachmentMeta, CallbackQueryMeta) to core ownership; channels/telegram/models.py imports and re-exports them for backward compatibility. NormalizedEventMapper in core/events/mapper.py converts channel NormalizedEvent -> OrchestratorEvent with full field mapping. 14 unit tests passing.

tasks.name: Voice and Attachment Metadata Intake [CMP_CHANNEL_TELEGRAM_ADAPTER]
tasks.description: Implement voice and attachment metadata handling with synchronous Telegram MTProto transcription intake and transcript_text mapping.
tasks.notes: Implemented TranscriptionWorkerInterface (abstract contract for MTProto worker), VoiceTranscriptionService (timeout + structured audit logging, returns (transcript_text, failure_reason) tuple, never raises). Added mtproto_api_id/mtproto_api_hash/transcription_timeout_seconds to TelegramChannelConfig schema. TelegramIngress gains optional transcription_service param and normalize_async() which enriches voice events via MTProto before handoff; on failure stores audit_transcription_failure in event metadata. TelegramAdapter gains process_update_async() for voice-enriched normalization. 14 unit tests all passing.

tasks.name: Channel Throttling and Audit Logging [CMP_OBSERVABILITY_LOGGING]
tasks.description: Integrate per-channel throttling with channel audit logging and retry telemetry.
tasks.notes: ChannelThrottleGuard: in-memory sliding-window rate limiter (configurable max_per_window, default 20/min) per user_id, raises ThrottledError on breach. ChannelAuditLogger: structured audit emission for ingress (authorized/blocked/throttled) and egress (attempt/success/retry_after/network_error/api_error/failure) events. Integrated into TelegramIngress (throttle + audit) and TelegramEgress (audit). TelegramAdapter wires both from config.throttle_max_per_minute. Added throttle_max_per_minute field to TelegramChannelConfig. 23 new unit+integration tests; 319 total tests passing.

tasks.name: Telegram Recent Sessions Listing and Resume Selection [CMP_CHANNEL_TELEGRAM_ADAPTER]
tasks.description: Implement Telegram flow to list latest resumable sessions and switch active session via signed callback selection.
tasks.notes: Implemented SessionResumeService with HMAC-signed callbacks, session listing/metadata extraction, and TelegramAdapter session-context overrides. 39 focused unit tests added.

tasks.name: Wire Telegram Polling Handler to Orchestrator Runtime [CMP_CORE_AGENT_ORCHESTRATOR]
tasks.description: Replace temporary echo bridge with orchestrator-backed event handling so Telegram responses are generated by the agent runtime.
tasks.notes: Orchestrator module in core/orchestrator.py: idempotency check, session lock, replay assembly, direct model path, greeting for new sessions, atomic persist. api/main.py wires StoreFacade, IngressIdempotencyService, AnthropicAdapter, Orchestrator; TelegramAdapter receives session_store for session-resume. Handler dispatches session-resume request/callback before orchestrator. 12 orchestrator unit tests, 388 total tests passing.

deliverables: Telegram adapter and response pipeline
Event normalization and callback handling path
Attachment and voice handlers with fallback responses
Channel-level throttling/retry and audit telemetry
Interactive recent-session picker and active-session switch path
success_criteria: Authorized Telegram interactions complete reliably
Normalized event schema remains stable for supported Telegram event types
Unauthorized users are blocked and audited
Failed outbound sends follow configured retry behavior
Telegram user can list latest sessions and resume selected session via signed callback flow

phases.name: Filesystem Memory and Retrieval Quality
phases.description: Deliver durable long-term memory with deterministic retrieval, deduplication, and index repair behavior.

tasks.name: Memory Schema and Directory Model [CMP_MEMORY_FILESYSTEM_STORE]
tasks.description: Implement markdown+frontmatter memory schemas and directory structure for core memory categories.

tasks.name: Deterministic Retrieval and Index Pipeline [CMP_MEMORY_FILESYSTEM_STORE]
tasks.description: Implement deterministic non-vector retrieval/index pipeline with category caps and bounded context assembly.

tasks.name: Memory Write, Confidence, and Dedup Policies [CMP_MEMORY_FILESYSTEM_STORE]
tasks.description: Implement controlled memory write/update policy, confidence thresholds, and deduplication behavior.

tasks.name: Index Rebuild/Repair and Degraded Fallback [CMP_MEMORY_FILESYSTEM_STORE]
tasks.description: Implement index rebuild and repair path with degraded-mode fallback retrieval and diagnostics.

deliverables: Memory persistence module and schema validator
Retrieval/index pipeline with bounded context outputs
Update and deduplication policy implementation
Memory repair/rebuild utilities and diagnostics
success_criteria: Memory persists across restarts with schema validity
Retrieval provides relevant compact context under category caps
Duplicate and conflicting artifacts are reduced by update and consolidation logic
Index failures degrade gracefully with audit visibility

phases.name: Capabilities, Skills, MCP Bridge, and Sub-agent Delegation
phases.description: Deliver extensibility runtime with strict policy controls and bounded sub-agent delegation.

tasks.name: Manifest Discovery, Validation, and Registry Lifecycle [CMP_TOOL_RUNTIME_REGISTRY]
tasks.description: Implement capability/skill manifest discovery, validation, and runtime registry lifecycle.

tasks.name: First-party Capability Set and Skill Wrappers [CMP_TOOL_RUNTIME_REGISTRY]
tasks.description: Implement first-party memory, web research, shell wrappers, macOS bridges, and gh integration capabilities.

tasks.name: MCP Bridge and Tool Mapping Gates [CMP_TOOL_RUNTIME_REGISTRY]
tasks.description: Implement MCP bridge from server registry and explicit tool mapping with risk-class policy gates.

tasks.name: Dynamic Capability Shortlist and Descriptor Injection [CMP_CORE_AGENT_ORCHESTRATOR]
tasks.description: Implement dynamic top-N capability shortlist selection and descriptor injection with policy pre-filtering.

tasks.name: Sub-agent Coordinator Runtime Controls [CMP_AGENT_SUBAGENT_COORDINATOR]
tasks.description: Implement schema validation, model allowlist, capability subset checks, and budget/concurrency/TTL/heartbeat controls.

tasks.name: Capability/Sub-agent Trace and Audit Correlation [CMP_OBSERVABILITY_LOGGING]
tasks.description: Implement parent-child trace correlation and audit logging for capability and sub-agent execution paths.

deliverables: Capability and skill runtime with policy enforcement
MCP-enabled capability mapping and safe tool activation path
Sub-agent spawn/result/error contract enforcement implementation
Audit history for capability and sub-agent executions
success_criteria: Capabilities and skills load deterministically and invalid manifests are rejected
Per-turn tool context is shortlist-based, not full-catalog injection
MCP tools require explicit mapping and pass policy and confirmation gates
Sub-agent requests enforce model, capability, budget, and concurrency constraints with auditable traces

phases.name: Scheduler, Reminder Lifecycle, and Operational Hardening
phases.description: Deliver reliable scheduler and reminders, plus final admin hardening, backup/export, and tmux runbook validation.

tasks.name: Scheduler Runtime and Persisted Jobs/History [CMP_AUTOMATION_SCHEDULER]
tasks.description: Implement scheduler runtime and persisted jobs/history model.

tasks.name: Reminder CRUD via Orchestrator/API/Telegram [CMP_AUTOMATION_SCHEDULER]
tasks.description: Implement reminder create/list/update/cancel flows through orchestration, API, and Telegram response paths.

tasks.name: Retry, Missed-run, and Scheduler Audit Semantics [CMP_AUTOMATION_SCHEDULER]
tasks.description: Implement retry policy, missed-run handling, and execution audit semantics for scheduler jobs.

tasks.name: Memory Maintenance Job Integration [CMP_MEMORY_FILESYSTEM_STORE]
tasks.description: Integrate memory consolidation and index rebuild maintenance jobs with scheduler triggers.

tasks.name: Expanded Admin Operational Controls [CMP_ADMIN_MINIMAL_UI]
tasks.description: Expand admin panels for memory browser, capability/MCP toggles, scheduler/sub-agent audits, backup/export flows, and StoreRuntimeManager-backed store runtime diagnostics/remediation controls.

tasks.name: tmux Runbook and Smoke Checklist Validation [CMP_OBSERVABILITY_LOGGING]
tasks.description: Define startup/restart/check procedures and validate critical smoke checklist for runtime operations.

deliverables: Scheduler runtime with persisted jobs and history
Reminder creation/update/list/cancel support
Admin operational controls for runtime modules and MCP state, including StoreRuntimeManager-backed store diagnostics/recovery controls
Backup/export routines and documented restore process
Deployment and operations runbook
success_criteria: Scheduled reminders fire within expected latency window
Reminder lifecycle operations remain durable across restarts
Admin can verify and control health, memory, capability/MCP, scheduler, sub-agent state, and store runtime diagnostics/remediation actions
Backup and restore process is reproducible
Smoke checks pass for critical user and scheduler paths

notes: Tracker aligned with ASSISTANT_V1_IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN phase sequencing, dependencies, and quality-gate flow.
Tasks use component IDs that trace to ASSISTANT_V1_TECHNICAL_SPECIFICATION and domain ownership docs.
Store foundation is explicitly represented before Telegram and memory phases to match current architecture contracts.
Capability runtime includes MCP bridge and dynamic shortlist injection behavior per CAPABILITY_CATALOG and technical spec.
Sub-agent spawning remains explicit-model and policy-gated under phase 5 runtime controls.
Authoritative tracker for assistant_v1 scope is docs/assistant_v1/project_tracker.json.
